tasks.subject: Task 1: Refactor — llmNote/ → chatNote/ (mechanical rename)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 디렉토리/파일 리네임 + 모든 import 경로 업데이트. 기능 변경 0.

**Files:** Move `app/src/lib/llmNote/` → `chatNote/`, `app/src/lib/editor/llmNote/` → `editor/chatNote/`, `app/tests/unit/llmNote/` → `unit/chatNote/`. Rename: parseLlmNote→parseChatNote, LlmSendBar→ChatSendBar, llmNotePlugin→chatNotePlugin. Update imports in routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte, lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte, lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte, lib/ocrNote/runOcrInEditor.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** no llmNote/ remains; symbols renamed (LlmChatError/LlmNoteSpec KEPT until Task 3); npm run check/test/build pass; manual llm:// smoke ok.

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check && npm run test -- --run`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/chatNote/", "app/src/lib/editor/chatNote/", "app/tests/unit/chatNote/", "app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte", "app/src/lib/ocrNote/runOcrInEditor.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npm run test -- --run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no llmNote/ directory remains", "symbols parseChatNote/ChatSendBar/createChatNotePlugin renamed", "npm run check passes", "npm run test passes", "npm run build succeeds", "manual llm:// smoke ok"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Reorganize — backends/ollama.ts consolidation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** chatNote/sendChat.ts + buildChatRequest.ts + searchRag.ts → backends/ollama.ts 통합.

**Files:** Create `app/src/lib/chatNote/backends/ollama.ts`. Delete 3 old files. Update imports in ChatSendBar.svelte, runOcrInEditor.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** ollama.ts exports sendChat/LlmChatError/buildChatRequest/ChatRequestBody/searchRag/RagSearchError/RagHit; 3 files deleted; all imports updated; tests pass; llm:// + RAG smoke ok.

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check && npm run test -- --run`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/chatNote/backends/ollama.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npm run test -- --run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["backends/ollama.ts exports all 7 symbols", "old 3 files deleted", "all imports updated", "check + test pass", "llm:// + RAG manual smoke ok"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Parser — claude:// signature + headers + backend field
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parseChatNote 가 llm:// + claude:// 둘 다 인식. ChatNoteSpec 에 backend 필드. Claude 헤더(cwd, allowedTools, model) 파싱.

**Files:** Modify parseChatNote.ts (backend 분기 + 타입), defaults.ts (시그니처/헤더 정규식), parseChatNote.test.ts (claude:// 케이스).

**Acceptance Criteria:** claude://[model] parsed; ollama backend still requires model; cwd/allowedTools/model headers parsed; cross-backend keys silently ignored; Q:/A: turn parsing unchanged; all tests pass.

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- --run chatNote/parseChatNote && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/chatNote/parseChatNote.ts", "app/src/lib/chatNote/defaults.ts", "app/tests/unit/chatNote/parseChatNote.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- --run chatNote/parseChatNote && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["claude:// signature parsed with optional model", "ollama signature still requires model", "cwd/allowedTools/model headers parsed for claude", "cross-backend keys silently ignored", "Q:/A: turn parsing unchanged", "all existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Client — buildClaudeMessages + backends/claude.ts (sendClaude)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Q:/A: 턴 → Anthropic content block 직렬화 + SSE 스트림 소비자 + ClaudeChatError.

**Files:** Create buildClaudeMessages.ts, backends/claude.ts, buildClaudeMessages.test.ts, sendClaude.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** text + image URL 블록 순서 보존; tomboyUrlLink + 이미지 확장자로 이미지 식별; Q:/A: prefix → role; hardBreak → \n; sendClaude SSE delta → onToken; HTTP 401/503/429/413/500 → ClaudeChatErrorKind; AbortSignal → reason 'abort'; stream 종료 without done → stream_error.

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- --run chatNote && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/chatNote/buildClaudeMessages.ts", "app/src/lib/chatNote/backends/claude.ts", "app/tests/unit/chatNote/buildClaudeMessages.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/chatNote/sendClaude.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- --run chatNote && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["buildClaudeMessages serializes text and image URLs correctly", "Q:/A: prefix stripped to role", "sendClaude streams SSE deltas to onToken", "HTTP error codes map to correct ClaudeChatErrorKind", "AbortSignal handled cleanly", "stream without done → stream_error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: UI — ChatSendBar backend branching
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ChatSendBar 가 spec.backend 로 분기 — claude 면 sendClaude, ollama 면 기존 sendChat.

**Files:** Modify ChatSendBar.svelte.

**Acceptance Criteria:** backend 분기 동작; claude 경로에서 buildClaudeMessages 호출 + body 에 cwd/allowedTools/model/system 포함; 응답 스트림 → A:; 정상 종료 → 새 Q:; 에러 → 한국어 메시지 + 새 Q:; abort → 부분 응답 보존; llm:// 회귀 없음.

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check && npm run test -- --run && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/chatNote/ChatSendBar.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npm run test -- --run && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["backend branch logic in send()", "claude path calls sendClaude with buildClaudeMessages output", "ollama path behavior unchanged", "formatClaudeError 한국어 메시지", "abort/error/done 모두 새 Q: 추가", "build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Bridge — POST /claude/chat proxy route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pi 브릿지에 /claude/chat 추가. Bearer 검증 후 데스크탑 claude-service 로 SSE pass-through.

**Files:** Create bridge/src/claude.ts, claude.test.ts. Modify server.ts (라우트 등록 + CLAUDE_SERVICE_URL env).

**Acceptance Criteria:** 401 on bad bearer; 503 when CLAUDE_SERVICE_URL unset; 400 on bad body; SSE pass-through on 200; AbortSignal on client close; 5xx propagated; body limit 2 MiB.

**Verify:** `cd bridge && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/claude.ts", "bridge/src/claude.test.ts", "bridge/src/server.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401 on bad bearer", "503 when CLAUDE_SERVICE_URL unset", "400 on bad request body", "SSE pass-through on success", "AbortSignal on client close", "5xx upstream propagated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: claude-service — core (project + runner + server)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 데스크탑 Node 서비스. POST /chat → claude -p subprocess + stream-json → SSE. FakeClaudeRunner 로 단위 테스트.

**Files:** Create claude-service/{package.json,tsconfig.json,src/server.ts,src/runner.ts,src/auth.ts,tests/_fakes.ts,tests/runner.test.ts,tests/server.test.ts}.

**Acceptance Criteria:** npm install + build 성공; FakeClaudeRunner 기반 테스트 통과 (실제 CLI 안 부름); stream-json → SSE delta/done/error 변환; AbortSignal → SIGTERM; cwd 없으면 --disallowedTools '*'; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 빈 문자열; partial line buffering; tool_use 무시; 인증/검증/사이즈/cwd 체크.

**Verify:** `cd claude-service && npm test && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["claude-service/package.json", "claude-service/tsconfig.json", "claude-service/src/server.ts", "claude-service/src/runner.ts", "claude-service/src/auth.ts", "claude-service/tests/_fakes.ts", "claude-service/tests/runner.test.ts", "claude-service/tests/server.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd claude-service && npm test && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all tests pass with FakeClaudeRunner (no real CLI)", "stream-json → SSE conversion correct", "--disallowedTools '*' when no cwd", "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env cleared", "partial line buffering works", "auth + body validation + cwd check", "build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: claude-service — deployment (Containerfile + Quadlet + docs)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 컨테이너 이미지 + Quadlet unit + 셋업 README.

**Files:** Create claude-service/{Containerfile, deploy/claude-service.container, deploy/README.md}.

**Acceptance Criteria:** podman build 성공; claude CLI 글로벌 설치; Quadlet unit installable; Volume mount ~/.claude → /data/.claude; README 가 셋업 단계 명시; smoke curl → 400 bad_request.

**Verify:** `cd claude-service && podman build -t claude-service:latest .`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["claude-service/Containerfile", "claude-service/deploy/claude-service.container", "claude-service/deploy/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "cd claude-service && podman build -t claude-service:latest .", "acceptanceCriteria": ["podman build succeeds", "claude CLI installed in image", "Quadlet unit installable", "README covers setup steps", "smoke curl returns expected 400"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Manual verification + CLAUDE.md update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end smoke + CLAUDE.md 업데이트.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user (스펙 § 7.2). MUST NOT be closed by walking around it. Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item validated independently with output captured.

**Files:** Modify CLAUDE.md (채팅 노트 섹션). Create docs/superpowers/results/2026-05-23-claude-chat-note-verification.md (캡처).

**Acceptance Criteria:** claude-service active; bridge listening with CLAUDE_SERVICE_URL; chat-only flow; opus model; cwd tool mode; image input; abort; service-down error; llm:// regression-free; no API key leak in journalctl; CLAUDE.md updated.

**Verify:** `systemctl --user status claude-service.service` + 위 10가지 수동 캡처.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CLAUDE.md", "docs/superpowers/results/2026-05-23-claude-chat-note-verification.md"], "verifyCommand": "systemctl --user status claude-service.service", "acceptanceCriteria": ["claude-service active (running)", "bridge listening with CLAUDE_SERVICE_URL", "chat-only flow works", "opus model flow works", "cwd tool mode works", "image input flow works", "abort preserves partial response", "service-down error UI works", "llm:// regression-free", "no API key leak in journalctl", "CLAUDE.md updated with Claude backend section"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"]}
```
